metadata.title: Build a governed SR8 compiler prompt for software build using the compiler lens, handling ambiguous scope and chaotic input from a founder-operator in Canada.

mission.primary_objective: Build a governed SR8 compiler prompt for software build using the compiler lens, handling ambiguous scope and chaotic input from a founder-operator in Canada.
mission.success_definition: Artifact is valid JSON with required fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent.; compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.; Validation gates are explicitly defined within the artifact.; No markdown fences or extraneous text in output.

in_scope.item: Parse the raw intent (missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce a structured artifact with explicit validation gates. The output must be SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Artifact is valid JSON with required fields: artifact_type, depth_tier, runtime_target, should_block, blocked_reason, compiled_intent.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: compiled_intent contains Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined within the artifact.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: No markdown fences or extraneous text in output.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.raw_intent: Build a governed SR8 compiler prompt for software build using the compiler lens, handling ambiguous scope and chaotic input from a founder-operator in Canada.

compilation_rules.item: Reject incomplete intake with a repair receipt.

output_artifact_contract.item: fields: artifact_type: sr8_compiler_prompt; depth_tier: D2_PRODUCTION; runtime_target: Codex; should_block: False; blocked_reason: None; compiled_intent: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: string; Success Criteria: string; Output Contract: object

validation_gates: Gate 1: Confirm all required fields are present and non-null.; Gate 2: Verify compiled_intent has all five sub-sections.; Gate 3: Ensure no markdown fences or extra text outside JSON.; Gate 4: Validate that should_block is false and blocked_reason is null.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
